name: Veal Normande
recipeIngredient: 1 Each Tart Apple, Peel and Sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter with oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add veal and brown on both sides, turning once.
3. Transfer the veal to a platter.
4. Add brandy and shallots (if using) to the skillet and stir, scraping up any browned bits clinging to the bottom of the pan.
5. Blend in the cream and soup mixture, then milk.
6. Return the veal to the pan with apple slices.
7. Reduce heat and simmer, stirring once or twice, until heated through.
8. Serve over rice.
